zh.,Bromma,Malmohus,Sweden: 瑞典馬爾莫斯賀雷斯塔德布洛馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliane Aagesdotter Thott於1319年出生在瑞典馬爾莫斯隆德時，她的父親Aage Thordssen Thott32歲，母親Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle30歲。她和Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme至少有3個兒子。

zh-hans.,Bromma,Malmohus,Sweden: 瑞典馬爾莫斯賀雷斯塔德布洛馬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliane Aagesdotter Thott于1319年出生在瑞典馬爾莫斯隆德时，她的父亲Aage Thordssen Thott32岁，母亲Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle30岁。她和Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme至少有3个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Thott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian (Andhra Pradesh): Kappu (agrarian) name from Telugu thota meaning ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

historicEvents.description: Black Death killed one-third of population.

historicEvents.title: The Engelbrekt Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Engelbrekt Engelbrektsson, a Swedish mine owner and statesman, led a rebellion against Eric of Pomerania, King of the Kalmar Union. Sweden was upset with the Danes' interference with Swedish exports and unjust collection of taxes. The Engelbrekt Rebellion led to the deposing of Eric of Pomerania and the eventual dissolution of the Kalmar Union.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliane Aagesdotter Thott was born in 1319, in Lund, Malmöhus, Sweden, her father, Aage Thordssen Thott, was 32 and her mother, Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, was 30. She had at least 3 sons with Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliane Aagesdotter Thott est née en 1319, à Lund, Malmöhus, Suède, son père, Aage Thordssen Thott, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliane Aagesdotter Thott 1319 in Lund, Malmöhus, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aage Thordssen Thott 32 und ihre Mutter Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle 30. Sie hatte mit Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane Aagesdotter Thott è nata il nel 1319 nel Lund, Malmöhus, Svezia, sua padre, Aage Thordssen Thott, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.

ja.,Bromma,Malmohus,Sweden: スウェーデンマルムoハスハーレスタドブロンマ
ja.Lund, Malmöhus, Sweden: スウェーデンマルムoハスルンド
ja.lifeSummary: Juliane Aagesdotter Thottが1319年にスウェーデンマルムoハスルンドで生まれた時，父Aage Thordssen Thottは32歳，母Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfleは30歳であった。彼女はJens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Brammeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliane Aagesdotter Thott(이)가 1319년 스웨덴 맬o후스 런드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aage Thordssen Thott(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane Aagesdotter Thott nasceu em 1319, em Lund, Malmöhus, Suécia, seu pai, Aage Thordssen Thott, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliane Aagesdotter Thott родилась в 1319 г. в местности лунд, малмoхус, Швеция, её отцу по имени Aage Thordssen Thott было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliane Aagesdotter Thott nació en 1319, en Lund, Malmöhus, Suecia, su papá, Aage Thordssen Thott, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Jens Benedictsen Hollunger I af Bramme.
